entries.term: WorkBuddy: Produce sharpened results faster with a team of AI experts
entries.product_direction: 面向内容团队的 AI 专家协作平台，多角色 Agent 并行产出并统一 sharpen 交付物
entries.suggested_headline: A Team of AI Experts That Sharpen Your Best Work — Fast

entries.term: Endl: A global operating account for fiat, stablecoins, and cards.
entries.product_direction: 面向跨境自由职业者与小型团队的法币+稳定币统一运营账户，简化全球收付
entries.suggested_headline: One Global Account for Fiat, Stablecoins, and Cards

entries.term: DocsAlot: Documentation that works for both humans and AI systems
entries.product_direction: 面向开发者团队的人机双读文档平台，单一信源同时服务人类阅读与 AI RAG
entries.suggested_headline: Documentation That Humans Read and AI Agents Actually Understand

entries.term: TryCase: Disposable test environments for AI coding agents
entries.product_direction: 面向 AI 编程 Agent 的一次性测试沙箱，秒级启动、完全隔离、用完即毁
entries.suggested_headline: Disposable Test Environments for AI Coding Agents — Spin Up in Seconds

entries.term: MentionDrop MCP: Give your AI agent live market signals
entries.product_direction: 面向交易与投研 Agent 的 MCP 实时市场信号插件，过滤噪声、结构化推送
entries.suggested_headline: Live Market Signals Your AI Agent Can Actually Act On

entries.term: CircleChat: Give your AI agents a slack, a task board, and a boss
entries.product_direction: 面向多 Agent 团队的协作编排工作台，集成消息、任务看板与调度 Boss
entries.suggested_headline: Slack, Task Board, and a Boss — For Your AI Agent Team

entries.term: Toku Reader: Read & listen to native Japanese and Chinese, tap any word
entries.product_direction: 面向日语/中文学习者的沉浸式阅读器，点词即查、原声朗读、渐进式词汇积累
entries.suggested_headline: Read Native Japanese & Chinese — Tap Any Word to Learn Instantly
